fixtures.name: read_mass_flow_v0h0
rx_full_transaction: CA C0 5F CF CF DE 03 72 2E 21 F2
fixtures.rx_data_frame: CA C0 5F CF CF DE 03 72 2E 21 F2
fixtures.notes: Address 3 byte = 0xAC; V=0 byte = wire of (0x5F - 0); H=0 byte = wire of (0x5F - 0). Real ZA672 reply through its RS232 CLI: '3,0.0'.

fixtures.notes: Address 3 byte = 0xAC; V=0 byte = wire of (0x5F - 0); H=1 byte = wire of (0x5F - 1). Real ZA672 reply through its RS232 CLI: '3,0.0002430857'.

fixtures.name: read_tag_number_v10h0
fixtures.description: V10H0 (=VAH0) tag (string). DATA payload bytes are synthetic — computed from the standard 0x7F-complement+parity encoding for the tag string 'DEMO TAG'. The actual tag in the test device was anonymized for publication. Response CRC bytes are placeholders (the response-CRC formula has not yet been fully reverse-engineered, so this fixture exercises only the decoder).
rx_full_transaction: CA C0 5F BB 3A B2 30 5F 2B BE B8 72 00 00 F2
fixtures.rx_data_frame: CA C0 5F BB 3A B2 30 5F 2B BE B8 72 00 00 F2
fixtures.notes: Address 3 byte = 0xAC; V=10 byte = wire of (0x5F - 10); H=0 byte = wire of (0x5F - 0). Payload computed synthetically: each char encoded as wire = (0x7F - ord(char)) with even parity.

fixtures.name: read_sw_version_com_v2h6

rx_full_transaction: CA 22 5F AC 5F DD 5F 59 72 A6 A5 F2
CA C0 5F CC CF CF CF CF 5F 03 72 AC AF F2
fixtures.rx_data_frame: CA C0 5F CC CF CF CF CF 5F 03 72 AC AF F2
fixtures.notes: Address 3 byte = 0xAC; V=2 byte = wire of (0x5F - 2); H=6 byte = wire of (0x5F - 6). Real ZA672 reply through its RS232 CLI: '3,30000'.
